hypothesis.text: Cache hit tokens cost approximately 10% of full input token price on Anthropic

query.text: Anthropic Claude prompt caching token cost pricing per million tokens

hits.title: Prompt caching - Anthropic
hits.snippet: Cache reads cost 10% of the base input token price. Cache writes cost 125% of the base input token price.

hits.title: API Pricing - Anthropic
hits.snippet: Prompt caching write tokens: $3.75/MTok. Prompt caching read tokens: $0.30/MTok for Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

hits.title: Pricing - OpenAI
hits.snippet: Cached input tokens for GPT-4o: $1.25/MTok, a 50% discount on the base input price.
